# Security Policy

## Supported versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.0.x   | Yes       |

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue for security problems.**

Use [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/ganjamkarthik1910/AlgoCodeHub/security/advisories/new) (private report) or contact the repository owner directly.

We aim to acknowledge reports within a week.

## CI and workflows

Changes under `.github/` require maintainer review (see `CODEOWNERS`). Fork pull requests run with read-only repository access and cannot publish releases.
